texto: Las Vegas audiences are swingers. They're drinkers and swingers, and they like to have a good time and party. I never had a bad audience in my career. Sometimes it may take a little longer to get them, you know. But I would get them. I'd get standing ovations... Everything is attitude. It's very important to always like what you're doing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Trini Lopez: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Las Vegas audiences are swingers. They're drinkers and swingers, and they like to have a good tim…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, time, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de good e party.

frase_original: Las Vegas audiences are swingers. They're drinkers and swingers, and they like to have a good time and party. I never had a bad audience in my career. Sometimes it may take a little longer to get them, you know. But I would get them. I'd get standing ovations... Everything is attitude. It's very important to always like what you're doing.

texto: I knew Sinatra for 38 years. He was like my father. Frank Sinatra was my 'dad.' He treated me like his son. He gave me the best advice about singing, about this and that... He was a very sensitive man, very astute, one of the sharpest men that I ever met in my life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Trini Lopez: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I knew Sinatra for 38 years. He was like my father. Frank Sinatra was my 'dad.' He treated me lik…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, vida, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e inspiracional.
